title: Claude Project
description: Project context file for Claude Code. Works like .git — drop it in any directory to give Claude persistent memory, Obsidian sync, and source-attributed journal entries for that project.

version.description: Schema version. Always '3' for this release.

project_id.description: Unique UUID for this project. Generated by claude-project init.

name.description: Human-readable project name. Used as the Obsidian folder name.

examples: Persistent AI persona for Anki Vector robot

created.description: ISO 8601 date the project was initialised.

created_by.description: Source label at time of creation — hostname / user.

obsidian_vault.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault root. Diary entries are synced here. Defaults to CLAUDE_OBSIDIAN_VAULT env var or ~/.claude/obsidian.

obsidian_folder.description: Subfolder inside the vault for this project's diary entries.

diary_path.description: Absolute path to the memory directory for this project. Contains WAKEUP.md, SESSION_JOURNAL.md, discoveries.md, etc. Defaults to CLAUDE_DIARY_PATH env var or ~/.claude/memory.

stage.description: Optional current development stage — shown in VS Code status bar.

shared_paths.description: Named paths to shared resources on this machine (e.g. external drives, network shares).

devices.description: Named devices involved in this project with their IPs or hostnames.

mcp.description: MCP server overrides for this project. Merged with global ~/.mcp.json.
